rationale: Educ. Code §48.274 governs foundation school fund payment schedules for qualifying charter schools based on enrollment growth. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: Payments from the foundation school fund to an open-enrollment charter school under this section shall be made as follows:
_note: No textual or operative conflict found. The proposed homestead exemption increase may indirectly affect foundation school fund calculations elsewhere, but this section's mechanics are unaffected.
